svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ChatGPT"> <diagram id="transmit-path" name="Transmit Path"> <mxGraphModel dx="1983" dy="1065" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;" value="Transmit Path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="610" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#5E35B1;fontSize=17;" value="<b>Upper Network Stack / Application</b><br/>Plain Ethernet frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="600" x="500" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="<b>macsec_output()</b><br/>All outgoing Ethernet frames enter here" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="660" x="470" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFDE7;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Protect frame?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="300" x="650" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="protect" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1F8E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Protect with MACsec</b><br/><br/>Build SecTAG<br/>Assign Packet Number<br/>Encrypt payload<br/>Generate ICV" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="390" x="300" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bypass" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Bypass MACsec</b><br/><br/>Frame remains unchanged" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="390" x="910" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="protected-frame" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Protected Ethernet Frame</b><br/>DST | SRC | MACsec EtherType | SecTAG | Ciphertext | ICV" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="470" x="260" y="855" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-frame" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Original Ethernet Frame</b><br/>DST | SRC | EtherType | Plain Payload" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="470" x="870" y="855" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="driver" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=17;" value="<b>Ethernet Driver</b><br/>Transmit frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="600" x="500" y="990" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="app" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="output" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="decision"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-yes" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="protect" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-no" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="bypass" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-protected" edge="1" parent="1" source="protect" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="protected-frame"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-plain" edge="1" parent="1" source="bypass" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="plain-frame"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-driver1" edge="1" parent="1" source="protected-frame" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="driver"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-driver2" edge="1" parent="1" source="plain-frame" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="driver"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;fontSize=13;" value="MKA control frames are built separately and transmitted through the control-frame API." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="340" x="90" y="975" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
